title: The Off-shore Islands Development Board (Dissolution) Ordinance, 1982
title_en: The Off-shore Islands Development Board (Dissolution) Ordinance, 1982
description: An Ordinance to make provision for the dissolution of the Off shore Islands Development Board. WHEREAS it is expedient to make provision for the dissolution of the Off shore Islands Development Board and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto; NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamation of the 24th March, 1982, and in exercise of all powers enabling him in that behalf, the Chief Martial Law Adm...

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Ordinance may be called the Off-shore Islands Development Board (Dissolution) Ordinance, 1982 .
(2) It shall come into force on the 1st October, 1982.

provisions.title: 2. Definitions
3. Dissolution of the Board

definitions.definition: any one of the following Boards, namely:-
